segments.text: Raghav Chadha's move to BJP and its constitutional implications.
Normally, an MP/MLA changing parties is disqualified under the anti-defection law.
However, if 2/3 of a party's members join another party, it is considered a merger.
Since 7 out of 10 AAP MPs joined BJP, no one was disqualified.
Similar instances happened with TDP in 2019 and Congress in Goa.
While legally valid, the video questions the impact on public trust.
